practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the memory helper
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it picks the correct memory tool for each kind of problem.
hints: Seen-before checking is a set job.
Two Sum uses fast lookup by need, which is also a map job.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You matched the problem types to the right memory tool.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck which jobs need only presence and which jobs need extra information.
